params.name: Beowulf
params.description:
On Feb 9, 831 AD, the earliest European vernacular epic, Beowulf, was completed.
Beowulf is an Old English epic in the tradition of Germanic heroic legend consisting of 3,182 alliterative lines. Beowulf, a hero of the Geats, comes to the aid of Hrothgar, the king of the Danes, whose mead hall in Heorot has been under attack by the monster Grendel. After Beowulf slays him, Grendel's mother attacks the hall and is then defeated. Victorious, Beowulf goes home to Geatland and becomes king of the …
